title: INTERNATIONAL DISASTER RESPONSE - 211info
text: AMERICAN RED CROSS WEBSITE INTERNATIONAL DISASTER RESPONSE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Helps locate or connect loved ones and friends who have been impacted by a current disaster event. Restoring Family Links reaches across borders to find family members who have been separated due to war, disaster, migration, or other emergencies. Locator Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (844) 782-9441 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Hotline (844) 782-9441 INTAKE PROCEDURE: -Visit website or call for more information -Missing persons requires an intake interview and document completion with a caseworker FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: Foreign Disaster Services Missing Persons Location Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: DISASTER SERVICES - RED CROSS SHELTER OPENINGS HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - BLOOD SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
